criteria.name: AI-Powered Tools
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI to enhance photo and video editing capabilities, including features like object removal, background replacement, smart enhancements, and AI-driven effects.

criteria.name: User Interface and Ease of Use
criteria.description: The intuitiveness and user-friendliness of the app's interface, making it accessible for both beginners and professional users.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The variety and comprehensiveness of editing features offered, including basic adjustments, advanced tools, and specialized AI functionalities.

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the final edited photos and videos, including resolution, clarity, and overall visual appeal.

criteria.name: Pricing and Accessibility
criteria.description: The cost of the app and its features, including free options, subscription models, and availability on different platforms (iOS, Android, Web).

criteria.name: Customer Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: Customer satisfaction based on ratings and reviews, reflecting the app's performance and reliability.
